title: an untouched capability needs a skip note; without one the fold shouts

assertions.detail: without a skip note: spec byte-identical AND fold prints "the loop did not close"
with a skip note: spec byte-identical AND fold prints "correctly nothing"

commands.stdoutTail: [companion] Living-spec fold: 1 capability loaded (todos), 0 delta blocks, 0 skip note(s) — 1 unaccounted (todos). The loop did not close: for each, author a delta block or record a skip (write-context.py --living-spec-skip "<name>: <reason>").

commands.cmd: python3 speckit-extension/scripts/write-context.py --feature-dir specs/002-rename-vars --living-spec-skip "todos: render-only refactor, no behavior change"

commands.stdoutTail: [companion] Living-spec fold: all 1 loaded capability (todos) is accounted for (folded earlier or skipped); nothing to fold — correctly nothing.

livingSpec.before:
# Todos capability

### Users can add a todo

#### Scenario: add a todo
- WHEN a user types text and submits
- THEN a todo appears in the list
livingSpec.after:
# Todos capability

### Users can add a todo

#### Scenario: add a todo
- WHEN a user types text and submits
- THEN a todo appears in the list
